hotelName: Bellagio Las Vegas United States Of America
reviewText: The hotel is absolutely beautiful.   I enjoyed the location, professionalism and all the other great benefits of this casino. The complaints I do have, is the cleanliness of the shower, the room not having a microwave. The refrigerator taking up all the space, with alcohol and a few bottles of water.  So you don't have anywhere to put left overs that you can't eat from the restaurants, so you are forced to eat all your food. Also if someone is a recovering addict due to alcohol,  the temptation is there unfortunately.   Less alcohol please, and more space for water and other healthy beverages for one to stay hydrated. Thank you

reviewText: An absolutely unforgettable stay! Bellagio exceeded every expectation. The room was spotless, elegant, and incredibly comfortable. hotelName: Bellagio Las Vegas United States Of America
reviewText:
We stay at the Bellagio for the location and the restaurants. The rooms are pleasant, but certainly not over-the-top. The lobby contains art and displays that are unique and colorful. The lines for check-in are often long. As a 3rd party reservation user (Expedia) I would appreciate being given the opportunity to check-in remotely in order to avoid these lines.
However, once you get through the line, the agents are extremely cheery and helpful. Sadelle's (their restaurant adjacent to the seasonal art display) is fabulous. Try breakfast in this beautiful restaurant or their A+ matzo ball soup for lunch! The staff there works extremely hard to make your meal delicious and provide you with a great experience.

reviewText: Our a/c was not working at all we arrived at 4 pm and left the hotel to go down at 6 pm and left the a/c on at the lowest level because it wasn’t cooling we arrived back at the room at around 11 pm and nothing it was hot. They offered to send a technician from 12 to 1 am it was late we were sleepy so refused and they offered a fan and accepted it they brought it up within about 30 minutes which was good but still not the same. Next day at 11 am or so technician came and fixed the issue and it cooled within the 2 or 3 hours which was a lot behest than the night before but being a luxury hotel you don’t expect that we did record boucher as credit but for me it doesn’t compensate suffering the heat for a whole night especially considering the Bellagio hotel.  But it was late and where sleepy so we just took the fan that night. Other than that it’s a great hotel with lots to do maybe just our luck that day.

reviewText: This hotel is beautiful and the rooms were nice and very clean. I was there for 4 days. The problem I had was while gambling each day sometimes several times a day, I could never get any assistance with getting a beverage. I would have to leave my machine  and go to the bar to get a drink, that was $20.50, when it should have been free because I was gambling. I made several attempts to stop someone. As much money as I spent in the casino, I  should not have had to pay for drinks.

hotelName: Bellagio Las Vegas United States Of America
reviewText:
My stay at the Bellagio was truly unforgettable. We chose it for our wedding trip to Las Vegas, and it made our experience feel even more special. The hotel is absolutely beautiful, with elegant décor, stunning aesthetics, and an atmosphere that feels luxurious from the moment you walk in.

The food was outstanding! We had our wedding reception dinner at Prime, and it exceeded our expectations. The meal and service made our celebration even more memorable. I also loved the Bellagio Bakery—it was delicious and became one of my favorite stops during our stay. Of course, the Conservatory & Botanical Gardens were breathtaking and added to the overall experience.

The only reason I’m giving four instead of five stars is because of the billing and check-in experience. I was charged for a room upgrade that I never received, and there were several daily fees that weren’t very clear upfront, including charges related to parking even though I didn’t have a rental car. Thankfully, I reviewed my bill before leaving instead of simply checking out, and the issue was corrected.

Also, the hotel is extremely busy. Self-check-in was convenient, but it was difficult to get assistance from a customer service representative because the lines were so long.

Overall, despite those issues, the Bellagio is an incredible resort. The beauty, restaurants, and overall experience made our wedding trip one we’ll never forget, and I would definitely stay there again. 💍✨
